---
title: "EDA"
output: html_document
---





```{r}
# Class Imbalance

print(paste0("Proportion of sick 14 days later: ", mean(df_final$sick_14_days_later == "1")))

print(paste0("# of negative labels: ", sum(df_final$sick_14_days_later == "0")))
print(paste0("# of positive labels: ", sum(df_final$sick_14_days_later == "1")))


```


```{r}

ggplot(df_final, aes(x = monocytes)) +
    geom_histogram(position = "identity", alpha = 0.5, bins = 30)

ggplot(df_final, aes(x = lymphocytes)) +
    geom_histogram(position = "identity", alpha = 0.5, bins = 30)

ggplot(df_final, aes(x = neutrophils)) +
    geom_histogram(position = "identity", alpha = 0.5, bins = 30)

```




```{r}

# ggplot(df_final, aes(x = log(monocytes))) +
#     geom_histogram(position = "identity")
# 
# ggplot(df_final, aes(x = log(lymphocytes))) +
#     geom_histogram(position = "identity")
# 
# ggplot(df_final, aes(x = log(neutrophils))) +
#     geom_histogram(position = "identity")


data <- df_final %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = c(monocytes, lymphocytes, neutrophils),
                 names_to = "cell_type",
                 values_to = "count")

ggplot(data, aes(x = log(count), fill=cell_type)) +
    geom_density(position = "identity", alpha = 0.5, bins = 30)




```




```{r}

ggplot(WBC, aes(x=`anon-date`-`anon-bmt-date`)) +
    geom_histogram()



```
